Total Results should be equal to the count of all the Groups that match the filter
The response should contain the Resources attribute when totalResults is non-zero
The response should contain all the Groups that match the filter
The response should contain all the required fields for Groups
The response should match the created resource
The response should contain be serialized to SCIM2 Core User
